# `src/vantage_v5/webapp/vendor/katex.min.js`

Vendored browser build of KaTeX used for local math rendering.

## Purpose

- Provide a local, browser-side LaTeX parser/typesetter so Vantage can render math without depending on a runtime CDN.
- Support the shared `math_render.mjs` read-surface renderer used by chat, concepts, the library inspector, and the whiteboard preview.

## Notable Behavior

- This file is third-party vendored code rather than repo-authored application logic.
- The current Vantage integration uses KaTeX as a narrow rendering dependency behind `math_render.mjs`; the rest of the app should not call the global directly.
- The current pass asks KaTeX for MathML output instead of relying on the full KaTeX HTML/font stack, which keeps the local asset surface smaller while still enabling LaTeX-style math rendering.
